Name: Effortless Rulesbooks
Description: A meta-ontology describing the ERB project itself: execution substrates, orchestration components, Airtable integration, testing framework, rulebook domains, data flows, configuration, and dependencies.

ProjectSettings.Name: baseId
ProjectSettings.Description: No Airtable base — rulebook is maintained directly in effortless-rulebook.json

Transpilers.Name: airtabletorulebook
Transpilers.Description: Pull rulebook from Airtable (disabled — no Airtable base for this meta-ontology)

Transpilers.Name: rulebooktoairtable
Transpilers.Description: Reverse-sync: push rulebook changes back to Airtable (optional)
